title: Odontoglossum trinasutum
taxonomy: Odontoglossum trinasutum is a type of orchid, more specifically belonging to the family Orchidaceae. Further classification places it within the subfamily Orchidoideae. It is part of the tribe Maxillarieae and genus Odontoglossum. This orchid is native to South America, specifically found in countries such as Ecuador and Peru. The species is characterized by its unique flowers and growth habit.
uses: Odontoglossum trinasutum, a species of orchid, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. However, there is limited information available about its medicinal uses.
